title: egenolfia neglecta
intro: Egenolfia neglecta, also known as Woodland Balsam, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Apiaceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its essential oil, which contains sesquiterpenes and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The plant is known to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and acting as an antiseptic. Egenolfia neglecta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a potential natural remedy for various health concerns.
